title: ageratina tristis
intro: Ageratina tristis, also known as bitter herb, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have a potential impact on various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ageratina tristis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Ageratina tristis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
